name: HTS_SHIFT_TYPES_DETAILS
description: Shift definition extension to support shift types library in scheduling application

columns.Name: SHIFT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Shift identifier to uniquely identify a shift

columns.Name: SHIFT_SHORT_NAME
columns.Comments: Short name for each of the shifts for display purpose

columns.Name: SHIFT_COLOUR
columns.Comments: Shift color to be displayed on the UI

columns.Name: START_EARLY_GRACE
columns.Comments: Clock integration Start Early grace period for violation

columns.Name: START_LATE_GRACE
columns.Comments: Clock integration Start late grace period for violation

columns.Name: END_EARLY_GRACE
columns.Comments: Clock integration End early grace period for violation

columns.Name: END_LATE_GRACE
columns.Comments: Clock integration End late grace period for violation

columns.Name: TOLERANCE
columns.Comments: Clock integration Threshold to ignore violation

columns.Name: START_EARLY_VIOLATION
columns.Comments: Clock integration Start Early violation message

columns.Name: START_LATE_VIOLATION
columns.Comments: Clock integration Start late violation message

columns.Name: END_EARLY_VIOLATION
columns.Comments: Clock integration End Early violation message

columns.Name: END_LATE_VIOLATION
columns.Comments: Clock integration End late violation message

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: SHIFT_CODE
columns.Comments: Shift unique Identifier code

columns.Name: TIME_NOT_WORKED
columns.Comments: Column indicates time not worked for a shift
